Name: Aristotle Circle
Tagline: Aristotle Circle is an innovative educational and advisory service. We specialize in admissions to US, UK, European and Canadian schools and universities, and act as a marketplace for families to obta
About: Aristotle Circle is an innovative advisory service that specializes in admissions to US, UK, European, and Canadian schools and universities, and acts as a marketplace for families to obtain support through all phases of their child’s education and later, their career. The admissions processes – from Kindergarten through graduate school – are confusing, tedious, and constantly evolving.
Philosophy: Donna has spent many years as a trustee of a prestigious US university, where she remains a trustee emerita, and of several private schools in New York City, where she remains a Head’s Council member.
Outcomes: Aristotle Circle has successfully guided students to gain admissions to Ivy League universities and top-tier schools. Our students consistently achieve high scores on standardized tests like the SSAT, ISEE, and AP exams.
Admissions: Aristotle Circle has carefully screened and vetted an impressive global network of experts who take the mystery and stress out of the admissions process. Our experts have detailed knowledge and experience with top colleges, universities, and K-12 schools and are here to support you and your family through the application process and beyond.
Quote: Aristotle Circle provides coaching and insider counseling for students applying to law, business, doctoral and other competitive graduate school programs.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Aristotle Circle's experts include Ivy League graduates and former admissions officers with specialized knowledge in SSAT and ISEE preparation, ensuring students receive top-tier guidance and support.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Aristotle Circle offers personalized counseling and community-building workshops to support students' mental and emotional health, fostering a balanced approach to academic and personal development.
Performance.Academic Integration: The consultancy provides tailored programs that integrate AP and IB curricula, focusing on critical thinking and problem-solving skills essential for success in competitive academic environments.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Aristotle Circle boasts a 90% acceptance rate to Ivy League institutions, with alumni excelling in diverse fields such as law, medicine, and technology, reflecting its commitment to long-term success.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Located in New York, Aristotle Circle offers state-of-the-art learning spaces, including digital libraries and interactive classrooms, designed to enhance the educational experience and foster innovation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Regular trimester reports and ERB assessments ensure Aristotle Circle maintains high educational standards, with advisors providing continuous feedback to students and parents to track progress effectively.
